Morimens 2nd Anniversary
U can replay ur battle
Now u can auto
Story debuff from 90 to 75 For hard
U can set as favorite character now at awakener menu
Layout change at Shop and Lobby, now there's Phasmal dive and Dtide menu
Now Limited Awakener seperated each arc, Faded Legacy and When Stars were right
U can set own bgm
U can get silver from archive for collecting
Free 200 Luminous core and 1000 silver and 1 origin of time
Now there's bar SAFE and Minus damage
